zh.lifeSummary: 當John Avenell於大約1384年出生在英國英格蘭戴文諾斯 莫爾頓時，他的父親Robert Molton Avenell26歲，母親Elizabeth de Blackpool21歲。他於大約1402年與Joan Gambon在英國戴文諾斯 莫爾頓結婚。他去世於1460年在英國藍卡爾布拉可普爾享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Avenell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Avenel, a double diminutive of ancient Germanic Avo. The surname was later confused with Averill .

variants.name: Averill
meanings: apparently from the name of the month (April), Middle English averil, Old French avrill, Latin aprīlis, perhaps with reference to freshness of temperament, or youth, or possibly to the changeable weather of the month.

perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Haverhill in Suffolk, with loss of initial H-. The placename derives from either Old English hæfera ‘oats’ or hæfer ‘he-goat’ + hyll ‘hill’. Compare Avery .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Avenell was born about 1384, in North Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Molton Avenell, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth de Blackpool, was 21. He married Joan Gambon about 1402, in North Molton, Devon, England. He died in 1460, in Blackpool, Lancashire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Avenell est né environ 1384, à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Molton Avenell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Blackpool, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan Gambon environ 1402, à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1460, à Blackpool, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Avenellが約1384年にイギリスイギリスデボンノース モルトンで生まれた時，父Robert Molton Avenellは26歳，母Elizabeth de Blackpoolは21歳であった。約1402年にイギリスデボンノース モルトンでJoan Gambonと結婚した。彼は1460年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクプオオルで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Avenell(이)가 대략 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 노르스 모턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Molton Avenell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Blackpool(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1402년 영국 데폰 노르스 모턴에서 Joan Gambon(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1460년 영국 랭카실르 블랙포에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Avenell родился около 1384 г. в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Molton Avenell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Blackpool, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Gambon около 1402 г. в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия. Он умер в 1460 г. в местности блэккпул, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.
